summary: Cosmic Daily Briefing and 3D Star Chart features - All 11 features tested and verified. Backend APIs (daily-briefing, star-chart/constellations) working correctly with 100% pass rate. Frontend pages load correctly with all UI elements present and functional.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with dreams and aura data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Briefing and Star Chart features complete. Test user has 2 dreams logged (Water, Flying, Moon symbols), blue aura, 2-day streak. Backend APIs: GET /api/daily-briefing returns personalized cosmic forecast (greeting, moon phase, mayan energy, element guidance, practices, ritual_status), GET /api/star-chart/constellations?lat=X&lng=Y returns constellation data with stars, elements, alignment reasons. Frontend: Navigation has 'Today' -> /daily-briefing and 'Stars' -> /star-chart. Star Chart uses vanilla Three.js with raycaster for star clicks.

daily_briefing_page_loads.description: Daily Briefing page loads at /daily-briefing showing greeting 'Good morning, cosmic soul', date, and streak badge

daily_briefing_moon_phase.description: Lunar Guidance section shows moon phase (First Quarter), illumination percentage, and guidance text

daily_briefing_mayan_energy.description: Mayan Tzolk'in section shows Resonant Blue Night (Kin 163), tone, and meaning

daily_briefing_element_guidance.description: Water Element Day section shows 'Intuitive & flowing' energy with focus guidance

daily_briefing_practices.description: Today's Practices section shows 3 clickable suggestions (Moon Salutation Flow, Chamomile & Ylang Ylang, Sacral Chakra Healing) with navigation links

daily_briefing_ritual_button.description: 'Continue Your Ritual' button navigates to /daily-ritual correctly

daily_briefing_quick_links.description: Quick links at bottom (Star Chart, Calendar, Sage) all present and navigate correctly

star_chart_page_loads.description: Star Chart page loads at /star-chart showing 3D canvas with stars and constellation lines

star_chart_header.description: Header shows 'Constellation Chart' title, location button (New York), and visible constellation count (16 visible)

star_chart_location_picker.description: Location picker opens with lat/lng inputs and preset cities (New York, London, Tokyo, Sydney, Cairo, Sao Paulo)

star_chart_preset_city.description: Clicking preset city (Tokyo) reloads star chart with that location's visible constellations

star_chart_element_legend.description: Element legend at bottom-left shows Fire, Water, Air, Earth with colored indicators

star_chart_mayan_badge.description: Mayan badge at bottom-right shows 'Today: Blue Night (Water)'

star_chart_constellation_detail.description: ConstellationDetail panel implemented with data-testid, opens on star click via raycaster (requires precise click on 3D star mesh)

navigation_today_stars.description: Navigation bar includes 'Today' and 'Stars' links that route correctly to /daily-briefing and /star-chart

api_verification.GET /api/daily-briefing: Returns personalized cosmic forecast with date, greeting, moon (phase, code, age, illumination, guidance), mayan (kin, glyph, sign_name, tone, element, galactic_signature, meaning), numerology, aura_color, element (name, energy, focus, color), mood, streak, dream_symbols, recent_dreams, practices, ritual_status
api_verification.GET /api/star-chart/constellations: Returns observer (lat, lng, lst_hours), time, constellations array (id, name, symbol, element, ra, dec, stars, meaning, altitude, above_horizon, aligned, alignment_reason), user_zodiac, mayan_element, aura_color, mayan_glyph
